Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessAssociation

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessAssociation
All Implemented Interfaces:
ISymbolicAssociation, ISymbolicElement
Enclosing class:
SymbolicLayoutReader
public static class SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessAssociation extends SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessElement implements ISymbolicAssociation
An implementation of ISymbolicAssociation which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.

    • getCondition

      public Term getCondition()

      Returns the optional condition under which this association is valid.

      The condition should be null by default. Only in rare cases, e.g. path condition is not strong enough to describe the path completely, is a condition is provided.

      Specified by:
      getCondition in interface ISymbolicAssociation
      Returns:
      The optional condition under which this association is valid.

    • getConditionString

      public String getConditionString()

      Returns the optional condition under which this association is valid as human readable String.

      The condition should be null by default. Only in rare cases, e.g. path condition is not strong enough to describe the path completely, is a condition is provided.

      Specified by:
      getConditionString in interface ISymbolicAssociation
      Returns:
      The optional condition under which this association is valid as human readable String.
